title: Repair Beads Dolt sync and macOS pre-push timeout behavior
description: bd dolt push hangs at 'Pushing to Dolt remote...' even though normal HTTPS git auth to https://github.com/pjbeyer/macOS-setup.git succeeds via osxkeychain. The generated Beads pre-push hook also does not bound execution on macOS because GNU timeout is unavailable, so git push can hang unless --no-verify is used. Investigate credential propagation for Dolt git+https remotes and add/patch a macOS-safe timeout strategy or documented workaround.

title: Design first macOS setup improvement series
description: Design the first cohesive series of improvements for the macOS setup utility starting from main. Initial themes to evaluate: safe CLI modes, dry-run/check/apply behavior, structured setting metadata, drift detection, macOS version guards, and CI/lint gates.
